validation_scope: semantic architecture for native AgentTeam runtime

checks.name: No unresolved placeholders
acceptance_criteria: The command exits with no matches.

checks.name: Core semantic phrases present
checks.command: rg -n "long-lived logical agent|short-lived runtime invocation|one writable attempt, one worktree|A2A is postponed" experiments/native_agentteam_runtime/semantic_artifacts/current/specs/runtime_semantics.md
acceptance_criteria: The required boundary phrases are present in the semantic spec.

checks.name: Acceptance criteria mapped
acceptance_criteria: Every AC id appears in at least one validation plan check.

early_probe.name: File-backed scheduler semantic simulation
early_probe.goal: Show the critical semantic path from ready task to validated result without needing real multi-agent execution.
steps: Load a sample backlog item and agent pool.
Select a ready task using deterministic scheduler rules.
Create a lease and mailbox dispatch.
Inject a fake structured worker result.
Validate result schema and write scope.
Append accepted or rejected validation event.
Replay event log to reconstruct task and attempt state.
success_criteria: Replay reconstructs the same task and attempt state as the snapshot.
No accepted state update occurs without a validation event.
A writable attempt has exactly one worktree id.
A2A is not needed for the probe.
